summary: Full testing of new features: Boss Guide (/bosses), Kill Range Calculator, Move Tracker, Encounter Suggestions, and Backend moves field. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: No view/eye button in encounters table to open PokemonDetailsModal for fainted Pokemon. Only available via party card clicks.

seed_data_creation: Added Poochyena (Pochie) encounter with moves Tackle/Growl to run 7200cc47-e330-4131-b4e8-49b042c9e60e
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 3 verified: BossGuide at /bosses renders Emerald/FireRed gym leaders and Elite Four (5 cards: Sidney/Phoebe/Glacia/Drake/Wallace+Champion). Roxanne expand/collapse works. Pokemon click opens PokemonDetailsModal with Stats/Weaknesses/KillCalc tabs. Kill Calc for geodude+Electric returns Immune (correct: Ground types are immune to Electric). Encounter suggestions show 'Possible: Poochyena, Zigzagoon, Wurmple' for Route 101 in Pokemon Emerald run. Move Tracker: 4 move inputs visible in form, Tackle+Growl successfully submitted and stored via backend API.

test_results.navbar_4_tabs: PASS - Play, Library, Nuzlocke, Bosses all visible
test_results.boss_guide_emerald: PASS - 8 gym leaders rendered for Emerald
test_results.boss_guide_firered: PASS - 8 gym leaders rendered for FireRed
test_results.boss_guide_elite_four: PASS - 5 cards (Sidney, Phoebe, Glacia, Drake, Wallace/Champion)
test_results.roxanne_expand_collapse: PASS - Card expands to show team (2x Geodude + Nosepass), counters, tips
test_results.modal_stats_tab: PASS - Shows ROCK/GROUND types, base stats (BST 300), moves
test_results.modal_weaknesses_tab: PASS - Shows Gen3 type chart, no Fairy type listed
test_results.kill_calc_geodude_electric: PASS - Returns 'Electric move doesn't affect geodude! Immune — 0x damage' (Ground immune to Electric)
test_results.move_tracker_form: PASS - 4 move inputs (Move 1-4) visible in Log Encounter form
test_results.move_tracker_submit: PASS - Encounter with Tackle+Growl saved to backend
test_results.encounter_suggestions: PASS - Route 101 shows 'Possible: Poochyena, Zigzagoon, Wurmple'
test_results.backend_moves_field: PASS - POST /api/nuzlocke/runs/{id}/encounters accepts and returns moves field
